scripts.api:compare: cd scripts/api-compare && bash fetch-rails.sh && ruby extract-ruby-api.rb && npx tsx extract-ts-api.ts && npx tsx compare.ts
scripts.test:compare: cd scripts/test-compare && bash fetch-rails-tests.sh && ruby extract-ruby-tests.rb && npx tsx extract-ts-tests.ts && npx tsx compare.ts
scripts.convention:compare: cd scripts/test-compare && bash fetch-rails-tests.sh && ruby extract-ruby-tests.rb && npx tsx extract-ts-tests.ts && npx tsx convention-compare.ts
scripts.test:stubs: npm run test:compare && npx tsx scripts/test-compare/generate-stubs.ts
